title: Mini Mod: Random Ore
description: A random ore, for more randomness
body:
This mod adds 3 new Ore:

Random Ore
Deepslate Random Ore
Nether Random Ore
Everyone has a chance to give
Random ore and Deepslate ore: Coal, copper, lapis, redstone, iron, gold, emerald, and diamond
Nether Random Ore: Quartz, gold nuggets, ancient debris
